headings: GSC Birchway Commerce City Project No. c20-849
text: This Conditional Waiver and Release of Lien Upon Progress Payment is expressly conditioned upon receipt of payment and posting of same with Supplier's financial institution in the amount of $ by Supplier from (Subcontractor).  This Conditional Waiver and Release of Lien upon Progress Payment waives and releases all claims of every kind that Supplier has or may have in connection with Contractor, the Project and the Property through the Release Date, and which could be asserted against the Project, the Property, Subcontractor, Contractor, Owner, any lender on the Project and all officers, shareholders, members, managers, directors, agents and employees of any of them. This Conditional Waiver and Release of Lien Upon Progress Payment covers all claims through the Release Date except for retention.
